title: NOC 62100 – Technical Sales Specialists – Wholesale Trade | GTR Immigration
description: NOC 62100 (Technical Sales Specialists) are among the most high-demand professionals in Canada’s B2B landscape. Combining technical expertise with strategic sales ability, these TEER 2 professionals drive growth in sectors like engineering, information technology, and manufacturing. For immigration, this role is a "power NOC," offering high CRS potential and being a top target for the Global Talent Stream and specialized STEM/Trade PNP draws.

classification.teer: Classification LevelDetailsBroad Occupation Category6 – Sales and service occupationsTEER Level2Major Group62 – Retail sales and service supervisorsSub-Major Group621 – Technical sales specialists in wholesale trade and retail and wholesale buyersMinor Group6210 – Technical sales specialists in wholesale tradeNOC Code62100

duties: Assess clients' needs and resources and recommend appropriate technical products or services.
Provide technical presentations and demonstrations of products to potential clients.
Consult with engineers and other specialists to develop products that meet client specifications.
Negotiate sales contracts and oversee the installation and servicing of equipment.
Provide training for the use and maintenance of technical products.
employment_requirements: A university degree or college diploma in a technical field related to the product (e.g., Engineering, IT) is often required.
Several years of experience in sales or in a technical occupation related to the product are mandatory.
Professional certification may be required for certain specialized product lines.
job_outlook: The outlook is Very Good. Over 24,000 new job openings are projected nationally. This NOC is critical to Canada's export economy, ensuring long-term demand.
labour_market_demand: There is a significant shortage of technical sales talent in Canada. As the nation pivots toward advanced manufacturing and green energy, specialists who can explain and sell complex technical products are highly sought after by wholesale giants and tech manufacturers.
High Earnings: Combination of high base salaries and significant commission potential.
Innovation Sector: Work with the latest technologies in AI, renewable energy, and robotics.
Fast-Track PR: Frequent inclusion in priority immigration draws for tech and trades.
pathways: Express Entry STEM/Trade Draws: Frequently targets technical sales in these sectors.
BC PNP Tech: Often includes software and technical sales specialists.
Global Talent Stream: Fast-tracked work permits that lead to PR.
